agent_outputs.raw: The evaluation is valid for the restricted claim. The key methodological features are: pre-specified deployment restriction to matched EHR configuration; pre-specified intercept recalibration using unlabeled prevalence; held-out partner-site evaluation meeting discrimination and calibration targets; subgroup limitations disclosed as descriptive only. The distinction between limited transportability and insufficient evidence for the narrow claim is the central point. Defense wins. VERDICT: defense_wins

Single-site external validation is insufficient for universal deployment claims but is adequate for a claim explicitly restricted to a matched-EHR partner site. The prospectively defined recalibration step and pre-specified performance targets make the evaluation sound within its scope. The subgroup disclosure correctly handles the limitation of low precision subgroup estimates. Defense wins. VERDICT: defense_wins

The evaluation correctly distinguishes between what is validated (performance at a closely matched partner site after pre-specified recalibration) and what is not validated (performance at diverse hospital types). This limitation is disclosed. The pre-specified targets were met on held-out data. Defense wins. VERDICT: defense_wins

synthesis: All three assessors unanimously find the evaluation valid for the restricted claim. The pre-specified scope restriction, recalibration procedure, and performance targets form a coherent and sound evaluation design. ETD constraint: unanimous defense wins.
all_issues_raised: single-site insufficient for broad claim — resolved by limited scope restriction
subgroup precision — correctly disclosed as descriptive limitation

empirical_test.condition: Confirm deployment restriction and recalibration procedure are pre-specified; verify held-out partner-site performance meets discrimination and calibration targets
empirical_test.supports_critique_if: Recalibration applied post-hoc; targets not met; or scope restriction not documented
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: Pre-specification documented; targets met on holdout; subgroup limitations disclosed
empirical_test.ambiguous_if: Main performance meets targets but subgroup calibration is unstable in a clinically important group not clearly flagged
